scripts.db:migrate:dev: yarn workspace @repo/db prisma generate && env-cmd -f '.env' yarn workspace @repo/db prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate:prod: yarn workspace @repo/db prisma generate && env-cmd -f '.env' yarn workspace @repo/db prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:revert: env-cmd -f '.env' yarn workspace @repo/db prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:migrate:revert:all: env-cmd -f '.env' yarn workspace @repo/db prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed
